camera.title: Craft a Camera (Exposure mod — use film and developing chemicals to photograph the world)

subtitle.text: The Antique Atlas maps where you've been. The camera proves you were there.

description: CH.03 · ON PAINTINGS
▸ Exposure adds a film camera system.
You can photograph the world.
Develop the film. Display the photograph.
Leave a record of what you saw.
◈ EXPOSURE MOD SYSTEM
└ Camera: crafted from iron, glass, and redstone
└ Film Roll: loaded into camera, holds 8-16 shots
└ Develop: use Darkroom station + chemicals
└ Output: physical photograph item — shareable,
frameable, displayable in-world
└ Types: standard photo, black-and-white, aged photo
◈ WHY DOCUMENT
└ The lore says: someone explored before you
You're finding their notes.
This is how you become their notes for someone else.
└ Practical: photograph loot room layouts,
boss arenas, rare biomes before they're changed
└ Aesthetic: build a gallery wall of expedition photos
◈ SCROLL: On Paintings
└ Found in: artist's workshop chests, explorer camps,
road gallery ruins, museum-like structures
└ Research time: 10 min
└ Unlocks: full Exposure camera system awareness
▸ The atlas maps. The camera preserves.
The Sound Archive records.
Together they are the record of someone who lived here.
▶ Find the On Paintings scroll [check]
▶ Craft a Camera [check]
◇ Photographs can be framed with item frames.
Ch05 Culture chapter uses photography
as a documentation tool for the archive.
